name: query_markers
description: Query marker genes for a cell type from curated databases (canonical, CellTypist models, CellMarker 2.0, PanglaoDB). Returns a ranked list of markers with source attribution.

cell_type.description: Cell type name, e.g. 'NK cells', 'CD8+ T cells', 'Classical monocytes'. Aliases are resolved automatically.

top_n.description: Maximum number of markers to return per source.

sources.description: Restrict to specific sources. Default: all available.

returns.description: Object with cell_type, markers (list of {gene, source, rank}), sources, by_source, n_total.
